# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd no mtls and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8080"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8080"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: backend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "5432"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: postgres:14
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: postgres
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: database
  ports:
  - name: postgres
    port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: postgres
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: frontend-mtls-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "frontend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-mtls-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "backend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: database-mtls-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "database.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-allow-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - name: frontend-mtls-auth
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-allow-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: database-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - name: backend-mtls-auth
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-network-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
  - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
  - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
  - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-route
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: backend-server
    kind: Server
    group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
  - matches:
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /api
    backendRefs:
    - name: backend
      port: 8080
